name: Map of Aventuria
description: The world-map hub linking Land of Aventuria mini-adventures.

name: How To Play
description: Core tutorial for help squares, sword pickup, dragon combat, hospitals, power, and spells.

name: Save the Galaxy!
description: Starship, planet, and asteroid story about stolen Crystite, a bomb, a traitor, and Wistrik's time machine.

name: Alice in Wonderland
description: Non-combat Alice vignette sequence teaching spaces and character scenes.

name: Sam Club, Private I
description: Detective mystery about Jonathan Blublud, stolen diamonds, a hawk statue, suspects, subway/car portals, and confession.

name: Across the Delaware!
description: George Washington / Trenton scenario with a missing boat, Hessians, stores, and quiz routing.

name: Deep Dank Dungeon
description: Fantasy dungeon maze, magic scroll, altar, Wistrik, evil cleric, hidden doors, and time machine.

name: In the Nazi Castle
description: WWII castle escape about secret plans, guards, red-cross hospitals, and one-room-as-many-room mapping.

name: Secret Adventure
description: Hidden tutorial region left off the manual map to teach incomplete maps and creature programming.
